title: Three Prompts. One Brand Identity, in Masonry.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~47s. Featured brand: Magic Spoon. Inspired by Tim Koda (DVhucTujIVB, an emotional-branding reel). Full editor brief: visual, Masonry generation, supers, edit, transitions, SFX.
concept: A capability-proof brand-system reel for Magic Spoon. The inspiration builds a full brand identity from three prompts: define the emotional DNA, translate it into a visual direction, then generate every asset with texture keywords that feel handmade. The reframe makes Masonry the engine for all three steps, generating Magic Spoon's whole playful world, packaging, sticker mascots, the lot, with soul. Every asset is generated in Masonry following the Make in Masonry step, then cut to the beat.
audio: Warm, playful track with a handmade, tactile feel. Audio-only: no voiceover; the on-screen text carries the system. Cut every super to the beat.
refsummary: The original (Tim Koda) argues AI brands all look the same, clean and soulless, and the ones that connect feel handmade. He builds a full brand identity (a playful 'French Croissant' brand) in three prompts: define the emotional DNA with an LLM, translate it into a full visual direction, then generate every asset with texture keywords that make it feel human, ending on packaging covered in sticker mascots. Watch it for the three-step brand-system structure; our version makes the engine Masonry.
story: A capability-led brand-system proof. Arc: HOOK, AI brands all look the same, clean, polished, soulless. TRUTH, the ones that connect feel handmade. THE SYSTEM, three prompts, one brand identity. STEP 1, the brand's emotional DNA. STEP 2, a full visual direction. STEP 3, texture that feels human. PROOF, Masonry generates every asset, the packaging, the sticker mascots, the whole world. CLOSE, one system, on brand, with soul, Magic Spoon x Masonry. The viewer should leave believing Masonry can build a complete, soulful brand identity, not just single images.
takeaway: Masonry can build a complete brand identity from three prompts: emotional DNA, visual direction, and handmade-feeling texture, generating every asset from packaging to mascots with soul, not soulless sameness.
script_kind: On-screen text only. This is an audio-only reel: no voiceover, no spoken lines. Every line below is a super, shown exactly as written and cut to the beat of the track. Read top to bottom, this is the complete message of the video, word for word. Clean sans; emphasize the brand word Masonry in the accent color.

script.line: AI brands all look the same
the ones that connect feel handmade
one system. on brand. with soul.

beats.ost: AI brands all look the same
beats.visual: A generic-looking branded box, clean but lifeless. The problem.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'clean minimal cereal packaging, flat and generic.' Generate the before-state.
beats.edit: Slow push-in on the flat box.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0 to 2: the sameness problem over packaging.

beats.visual: Three sterile brand frames, technically perfect, emotionally flat.
beats.masonry: Three generations that look correct but cold. Set up the contrast.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 3 to 5: clean, polished, soulless.

beats.ost: the ones that connect feel handmade
beats.visual: Playful sticker-mascot art appears, warm and tactile. The turn.
beats.masonry: Generate playful mascot stickers with 'handmade, tactile, sticker-sheet texture.' Warmth enters.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 6 to 8: handmade sticker characters appear.

beats.visual: A clean title card framing the three-step system.
beats.masonry: Title beat: set up the three-step Masonry brand system.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 9 to 11: the three-prompt system framing.

beats.visual: A short screen-record of the emotional-DNA prompt and its output in Masonry.
beats.masonry: 0.6s screen-record: define Magic Spoon's emotional DNA in Masonry, the tone and feeling captured.
beats.edit: Screen-record, then a warm mascot frame.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 13 to 17: defining the emotional DNA with a prompt.

beats.visual: Typography, color and layout system generating, a coherent visual world.
beats.masonry: Generate the visual direction in Masonry: type system, palette, layout, all on brand.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 18 to 23: translating into a full visual direction.

beats.visual: Close-ups of grain, paper and sticker texture brought into every asset.
beats.masonry: Generate with texture keywords in Masonry: grain, paper, hand-cut sticker edges. Makes it feel human.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 24 to 29: texture keywords that make it feel human.

beats.visual: A wall of generated assets: mascots, boxes, bags, social frames, one world.
beats.masonry: Batch generate the asset set in Masonry: mascots, packaging, social. One cohesive identity.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 30 to 35: every asset generated.

beats.visual: Magic Spoon boxes covered in sticker mascots, the full brand world realized.
beats.masonry: Generate hero packaging covered in the mascot stickers. The world comes together.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 36 to 41: packaging covered in sticker mascots.

beats.ost: one system. on brand. with soul.
beats.visual: A confident hero of the full identity, alive and tactile.
beats.masonry: Hero generation of the complete Magic Spoon identity.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 42 to 45: the full identity, with soul.

beats.masonry: Close: the Magic Spoon x Masonry end card.
beats.edit: Clean cut to the end card.

notes: Editor workflow: load Magic Spoon's products into the Masonry library, then generate each beat with its Make in Masonry prompt and cut per the Super / Edit / Transition / SFX direction. Demo brand is a believable stand-in; swap in the real client when producing. All visuals are generated and assembled in Masonry. No media generated yet: generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
